name: ALEPH
short_description: Wield the power of light manipulation and talk to inhabitants of the destroyed planet on a quest to discover the secrets of a lost language. Solve mind-bending puzzles and stick to the shadows in this unique adventure.
detailed_description:
You are Aleph, a nomadic librarian with the power of light manipulation scouring the remains of a destroyed earth trying to reclaim and preserve a dying language. ///ALEPH is set in a world ravaged by an unknown apocalypse, you must use your wit to sneak into the heavily guarded compounds of the elites who hold this knowledge and save it. Within these compounds lie countless puzzles in which you both use your light manipulation to solve them and sneak around guards.



Features
  • Unique surrealist pixelized art style.
  • Various expansive compounds to sneak through and explore.
  • Dozens of light-based puzzles.
  • Various dynamic NPCs.
  • Challenging stealth gameplay.
  • Fully original atmospheric soundtrack.

///ALEPH, hide in the darkness in the hunt for the illumination of knowledge...
